title: Croatian Fried Tomato Stew
description: A hearty stew made with fried tomatoes and Croatian spices. This dish is perfect for a cold winter night.

ingredients.name: Fried Tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Diced and fried in olive oil

ingredients.name: Croatian Stew Spice
ingredients.notes: A blend of paprika, garlic, and caraway seeds

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add diced fried tomatoes, tomato paste, Croatian stew spice, caraway seeds, salt, and black pepper.
Bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let cook for 20-25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or dill.
